creator: bf1783@googlemail.com
text:
Also, I should mention that tor-devel is still failing one of the
regression tests on my machine (9-CURRENT amd64 r202708).  It
shouldn't prevent us from updating, as it has been happening for the
past several versions, but I'd like to know if any of you are
observing the same thing?  If so, someone should eventually
investigate.
Results:
